title: CRM-to-Email Sync
description: ARCHETYPE: data_sync. Shape: backend-only (no pages, no auth), CRON schedule (every 1 hour), FETCH from an external HTTPS URL, transform each record, SAVE to a destination table. This is distinct from batch_job (no external fetch) and from etl_pipeline (data_sync implies source→destination with 2+ external systems or an obvious source-of-truth relationship — here 'CRM users' → 'mailing list'). DO NOT build a dashboard. DO NOT add auth. DO NOT build multiple endpoints — only GET /api/mailing-list for verification. The CORE is: `every 1 hour:` then fetch users from 'https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/users', for each user save { name, email, tag: 'imported' } to MailingList.
skeleton:
build for javascript backend

create a MailingList table:
  name, required
  email, required
  tag, default 'imported'
  synced_at_date, auto

# Your scheduled sync job + /api/mailing-list endpoint here
# Use: every 1 hour: ... get users from 'https://...' ... save ...
